text.title: Incident Response Blameless Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Incident Response Blameless Playbook output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: action items tracked separately from product backlog

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: severity_matrix populated with a typed value
ic_roles populated with a typed value
comms_templates populated with a typed value
retro_template populated with a typed value
action_item_tracker populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
